tr.td: 120 ACTUAT fluticasone propionate 0.11 MG/ACTUAT Metered Dose Inhaler [Flovent]
Albuterol (as albuterol sulfate) 830 microgram/mL solution for inhalation
2.5 mg (3 mL of 830 microgram/mL solution) via nebulizer every 4 to 6 hours as needed
1 tablet (25 mg) every 6 hours as needed
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Live attenuated Human alphaherpesvirus 3 only vaccine product
Assessment of health and social care needs
Assessment using AUDIT-C (Alcohol Use Disorders Identification Test - Consumption)

ul.li: Achieve and maintain HbA1c below prediabetes threshold through lifestyle changes
Patient will demonstrate correct inhaler technique and adhere to asthma action plan to reduce frequency of asthma exacerbations.

tr.td: Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
